series_metadata.series_description: Awards issued by external sources honoring the Opportunities for Ohioans with Disabilities agency (OOD) as an agency (not specific staff)

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Maintain award as long as it is deemed have administrative value. Review by State Archives before disposal. when no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Maintain award as long as it is deemed have administrative value. Review by State Archives before disposal. when no longer of administrative value
